mechanism_narrative: A sustained low level of the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly supporting higher equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistical correlation with FEDFUNDS levels over a 5-year rolling window, or Rank IC remains below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid three-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding half a percentage point signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, which reduces corporate profit expectations and drives negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 65% of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.5pp, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) during contraction phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate broad-based consumer spending recovery across durable and non-durable goods, which boosts corporate revenue forecasts and generates positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when either series declines, or walk-forward backtesting shows a negative Sharpe ratio for the combined trigger over a 3-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month expansion in the index of industrial production reflects strengthening factory output and supply-side momentum, which translates into immediate positive market sentiment and short-term equity gains over the next week.
failure_condition: The signal reverses direction during late-cycle expansions, or 5-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with INDPRO growth (p-value > 0.10) in early-cycle regimes.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly inflation print exceeding 0.3 percent triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and generates negative forward returns over the next month as discount rates rise.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive or neutral when CPIAUCSL exceeds the 0.3% threshold, or the signal predictive accuracy drops below 55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a decline in the unemployment rate confirm a robust labor market expansion, which supports wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative returns in > 60% of triggered months, or the interaction effect vanishes when either series moves independently.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth reflects stronger aggregate economic activity and corporate earnings potential, which directly supports higher equity valuations and generates positive forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC for GDPC1 levels remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows, or forward returns show no statistically significant positive correlation with GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production exceeding half a percentage point signals a sudden supply-side contraction and weakening manufacturing activity, which triggers immediate risk-off sentiment and negative equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of instances where INDPRO drops > 0.5%, or the signal fails to maintain a negative Rank IC in contraction regimes.
